title: Weekly rate limits introduced
description: Anthropic added weekly caps on top of the existing 5-hour rolling window. Affects <5% of subscribers per Anthropic.

title: Claude Code limits tightened
description: Community reports of unexpected reductions in effective per-window allowances on the Pro and Max plans, undocumented by Anthropic.

title: Opus cap removed; Sonnet gets its own limit
description: Opus 4.5 launch: shared Opus weekly cap removed, Opus now uses the overall limit. Sonnet receives a dedicated weekly limit matching the previous overall cap.

title: Opus 4.5 weekly limit reduced
description: Opus 4.5 weekly allowance significantly reduced after the Jan 8 reset; reported as the most restrictive since launch.

title: Peak-hour throttling tightened
description: Anthropic redistributed weekly capacity: 5-hour windows drain faster during peak hours (05:00–11:00 PT / 13:00–19:00 GMT). Overall weekly limits unchanged.

title: Codex switched to token-based metering
description: OpenAI replaced per-message Codex limits with API-token usage metering across Plus, Pro, Business, and new Enterprise plans.

title: ChatGPT Pro $100 launch promo: 2× Codex usage
description: Through 2026-05-31, the Pro $100 tier doubles Codex allowances (10× Plus instead of 5×); Pro $200 keeps 25× Plus on the 5-hour window.
